criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Generation
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to assist in creating social media content, including text, images, and videos.

criteria.name: Social Media Management
criteria.description: The app provides tools for managing multiple social media accounts, scheduling posts, and analyzing performance.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Analytics
criteria.description: The app uses AI to analyze social media data, providing insights into audience sentiment, engagement, and trends.

criteria.name: Automation Capabilities
criteria.description: The app automates repetitive tasks such as posting, responding to inquiries, and content recycling.

criteria.name: Content Repurposing
criteria.description: The app helps repurpose existing content for different social media platforms.
